description: Your SOC is experiencing 'alert fatigue' due to repeated SSH brute-force alerts for the same attacking IPs. Using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, credentials admin/SplunkAdmin1!), create a scheduled alert named 'Throttled_SSH_Brute_Force' that identifies source IPs in the 'security_logs' index with more than 5 failed SSH login attempts. The alert must run every 5 minutes (cron '*/5 * * * *') and utilize throttling to suppress subsequent alerts for the same 'src_ip' for exactly 24 hours.
